name: Netochka
title: Netochka
desc: "Just as the oppressive, greedy governor here stole treasures from the Frostmoon Scions all those years ago, the Fatui now have seized things that don't belong to them.\nI must retrieve the Proof of the Cognoscenti from them and find Reed Miller's Great Treasure, so that his name, now forgotten, will be held in esteem once more throughout the world!"

skills.desc: When you trigger a Lunar-Charged or Lunar-Bloom reaction: Attach Battle Plan to your active character. (Once per Round)
